item.title: Showtime Website History
item.description: For now, this is a gitinfo tryout: (see https://gohugo.io/methods/page/gitinfo/) GitInfo: Gitinfo: AbbreviatedHash: 3994f9d AuthorDate: 2026-07-20 AuthorEmail: alinawallstein8@gmail.com AuthorName: alinawallstein CommitDate: 2026-07-20 Hash: 3994f9d8e1bac860a213cb63615b483c498232ae Subject: B1 - Pflanzbar (#516)
